questions.question: Explain the concept of a 'block' in the Ethereum blockchain, and how it differs from a 'chain'.
questions.hint: Describe the structure and purpose of a block in Ethereum's blockchain

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'difficulty' adjustment mechanism in Ethereum's proof-of-work consensus algorithm?
questions.hint: Explain how difficulty adjustment affects the rate of block creation in Ethereum

questions.question: Describe the role of the 'gas' mechanism in Ethereum's transaction processing system.
questions.hint: Explain how gas limits and fees are used to manage transaction processing in Ethereum
